description_long: This is a boxy, four-door SUV with a rugged, utilitarian design reminiscent of classic off-road vehicles. The exterior is predominantly black with a matte finish, featuring a flat hood, angular body panels, and exposed rivets along the sides. The roof and windows are made of large, clear glass panels, providing excellent visibility and a sense of openness for the occupants. The front fascia includes round headlights, a simple grille, and a robust bumper, while the rear is similarly minimalistic with circular taillights. The wheels are large with deep treads, suitable for both urban and off-road environments, and the interior appears to have four individual seats. The overall aesthetic suggests durability and functionality, making it well-suited for both city streets and rugged terrain.
description: A black, boxy SUV with a glass roof, rugged wheels, and a utilitarian, off-road-ready design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat hood, round headlights, simple grille, and two front seats visible through the windshield.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the boxy profile, four doors, large glass roof panels, and rugged wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat back, circular taillights, and clear view of the four seats through the glass roof.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the angular body, four doors, and detailed wheel design.
attribute_wheel_design: Five-spoke, rugged off-road style with deep tread pattern
